fields.name: TC_Impedance_Proxy

fields.name: TL Interval EC__MixFrac
fields.description: Estimated fraction of injection-like water at 'TL Interval EC' using two-endmember EC mixing: (EC_prod - EC_baseline)/(Injection EC - EC_baseline), clipped to [0,1].
transformations: engineered from Injection EC + baseline window; clipped [0,1]
fields.source_context: cleaned dataset column; sensor channels typically prefixed by well (TL/TN/TU/TS/TC). Engineered fields noted in 'transformations'.
